params.name: Particle Collider
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Tool Chest (0.01%), Wish Box, Wishing (0.07%)
params.description:
On Dec 8, 1961 AD, physicists developed the Particle Collider, which laid the foundation for the related fields of physics.

With the two colliders put into operation, charm quark and anti-charm quark particles were discovered. When scientists finished exploring high-energy physics, quantum mechanics needed to enter the ultra-microscopic field, which needed a large number of experiments to test the theory. Study of various particle properties, such as spin, momentum and other motion data were ne …
